name: Blood Debt Dating Simulator
description:
Successful Workplace Update 2/3: Added Halyna Shevchenkova and Alina Mahrisha (NOTE: SHE DOES NOT OWN A FLOWER SHOP IN THIS VERSION, i dunno i just never liked that part of her character. It's just kinda...Useless.)

What if instead of being super dark and scary, blood debt was a stupid dating sim all about getting laid? Imagine that.

every character has a wiki page on miraheeze (click for the link), just look up their name and you'll find 'em. sorry about the bio, just wanted to get this bot out and released.

also, multiple scenerios. first one has you as a poor person, second has you living in a highrise. either way you're new here. third has you as a member of the 'street gang'.
creator: thE_onE
